subject: Security Logging Fields
commit_message:
Security Logging Fields

- logback core and encoder dependencies are added.
- New appender is added to log JSON format content on console.

Issue-ID: CPS-986
Signed-off-by: sourabh_sourabh <sourabh.sourabh@est.tech>
Change-Id: Ia72b27f306019fa259b3d6de4c5399f0ae734076

Patch Set 11: Code-Review-1

Configuration is good to me.

When running it, it seems that logging entries are duplicated.

Example from my local:

  2022-05-04 09:16:30.068  INFO [cps-application,,] 2912 --- [           main] org.onap.cps.Application                 : Started Application in 11.384 seconds (JVM running for 13.509)
  {"logTimeStamp":"2022-05-04T13:16:30.068Z","logLevel":"INFO","principalId":"cpsuser","serviceName":"cps-application","message":"Started Application in 11.384 seconds (JVM running for 13.509)","processId":"2912","threadName":"main","class":"org.onap.cps.Application"}

To be checked ...

Patch Set 13:

I wanted to check if we have investigated if traceId works with async processing (Notification Service). The expectation is to have same traceId but different spanId. https://cloud.spring.io/spring-cloud-sleuth/1.2.x/multi/multi__integrations.html#_asynchronous_communication 
If there is a different story for it, then please share the link.

Patch Set 13:

> Patch Set 13:
> 
> I wanted to check if we have investigated if traceId works with async processing (Notification Service). The expectation is to have same traceId but different spanId. https://cloud.spring.io/spring-cloud-sleuth/1.2.x/multi/multi__integrations.html#_asynchronous_communication 
> If there is a different story for it, then please share the link.

Hi @Renu,
I investigated notification service that uses @Async annotation and found our current inplementation logging uses same spanid for non-async and async both.

{"logTimeStamp":"2022-05-09T19:49:34.126Z",
 
"logLevel":"DEBUG",
 
"traceId":"fa1fe5775ee5c1ef",
 
"principalId":"cps",
 
"serviceName":"cps-application",
 
"message":"data updated event to be published org.onap.cps.event.model.CpsDataUpdatedEvent]",
 
"spanId":"fa1fe5775ee5c1ef",
 
"processId":"24032",
 
"threadName":"qtp1680634575-28",
 
"class":"o.o.cps.notification.NotificationService"}

But we want to create a child/sub spanid then need to wrap our@Async annotated method with a @NewSpan annotation.

https://wiki.onap.org/display/DW/Asynchronous+Communication+Logging
